ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customer_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer segment (e.g., VHV, HV, MV, LV, VLV) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer segment */,
  "segment_type" TEXT /* Type of the customer segment (e.g., Value-Based, Demographic-Based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_bins" (
  "age_bin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age bin */,
  "age_bin_range" TEXT /* Range of ages in the bin (e.g., [40-59], >=50) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age bin */,
  "age_bin_category" TEXT /* Category of the age bin (e.g., Baby Boomer, Gen X, Millennial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the booking channel (e.g., Travel Agent/Operator, Online Booking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the booking channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of the booking channel (e.g., Direct, Indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Europe, Asia) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of the region (e.g., Continent, Country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segments_details" (
  "segment_details_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment detail record */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer segment */,
  "age_bin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age bin */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking channel */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "total_customers" INTEGER /* Total number of customers in the segment */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the segment */,
  "avg_revenue" REAL /* Average revenue per customer in the segment */,
  "avg_person_nights" REAL /* Average number of person-nights booked by customers in the segment */,
  "avg_rooms_nights" REAL /* Average number of room-nights booked by customers in the segment */,
  "avg_days_since_creation" REAL /* Average number of days since the account creation */,
  "avg_leadtime" REAL /* Average lead time (days) for bookings in the segment */,
  "segment_profitability" REAL /* Profitability of the segment (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "segment_growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the segment (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_details_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segments_details_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segments_details_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segments_details_age_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_bin_id") REFERENCES age_bins ("age_bin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segments_details_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer's account was created */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer segment */,
  "age_bin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age bin */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking channel */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_tier" TEXT /* Tier of the loyalty program (e.g., Silver, Gold, Platinum) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_age_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_bin_id") REFERENCES age_bins ("age_bin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES customer_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the reservation */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date the customer is scheduled to check in */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Date the customer is scheduled to check out */,
  "total_nights" INTEGER /* Total number of nights booked */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms booked */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the reservation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the reservation was created */,
  "leadtime" INTEGER /* Lead time (days) between reservation creation and check-in date */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking channel */,
  "reservation_status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., Confirmed, Cancelled, No-Show) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_nights" (
  "room_night_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room night */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservation */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room booked (e.g., Standard, Deluxe) */,
  "room_number" INTEGER /* Room number */,
  "night_date" TEXT /* Date of the room night */,
  "price_per_night" REAL /* Price per night for the room */,
  "room_status" TEXT /* Status of the room night (e.g., Occupied, Vacant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_night_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_nights_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservation */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending) */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of the payment (e.g., Deposit, Balance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservation related to the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was created */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of the feedback (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Manager, Staff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_category" TEXT /* Category of the role (e.g., System, Business) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_type" TEXT /* Type of the loyalty program (e.g., Points-Based, Tier-Based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_loyalty_programs" (
  "customer_loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer loyalty program membership */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loyalty program */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's loyalty program membership (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_loyalty_program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loyalty_programs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loyalty_programs_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)
